'''âk-m-s''' ('''kamas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rise|rise]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rise|rise]]
|-
! Citation form
| âk-m-s
|-
! Lemma
| kamas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikamas|thikamas]] || [[word:jikamas|jikamas]] || [[word:shikamas|shikamas]] || [[word:kikamas|kikamas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukamas|thuthukamas]] || [[word:jujukamas|jujukamas]] || [[word:shushukamas|shushukamas]] || [[word:kukukamas|kukukamas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukamas|thukamas]] || [[word:jukamas|jukamas]] || [[word:shukamas|shukamas]] || [[word:kukamas|kukamas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukamas|thukamas]] || [[word:jukamas|jukamas]] || [[word:shukamas|shukamas]] || [[word:kukamas|kukamas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekamas|thekamas]] || [[word:jekamas|jekamas]] || [[word:shekamas|shekamas]] || [[word:kekamas|kekamas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokamas|thothokamas]] || [[word:jojokamas|jojokamas]] || [[word:shoshokamas|shoshokamas]] || [[word:kokokamas|kokokamas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokamas|thokamas]] || [[word:jokamas|jokamas]] || [[word:shokamas|shokamas]] || [[word:kokamas|kokamas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokamas|thokamas]] || [[word:jokamas|jokamas]] || [[word:shokamas|shokamas]] || [[word:kokamas|kokamas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkamas|thĂŠkamas]] || [[word:jĂŠkamas|jĂŠkamas]] || [[word:shĂŠkamas|shĂŠkamas]] || [[word:kĂŠkamas|kĂŠkamas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakamas|thathakamas]] || [[word:jajakamas|jajakamas]] || [[word:shashakamas|shashakamas]] || [[word:kakakamas|kakakamas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakamas|thakamas]] || [[word:jakamas|jakamas]] || [[word:shakamas|shakamas]] || [[word:kakamas|kakamas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakamas|thakamas]] || [[word:jakamas|jakamas]] || [[word:shakamas|shakamas]] || [[word:kakamas|kakamas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakamas|shakamas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakamas|goshakamas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakamas|gokishakamas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakamasnĂŒ|shakamasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakamasnknĂŒ|goshakamasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakamasnĂŒ|gokishakamasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakamashĂ«|shakamashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakamasnkshĂ«|goshakamasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakamashĂ«|gokishakamashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakamasro|shakamasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakamasnkro|goshakamasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakamasro|gokishakamasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakamasmu|shakamasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakamasnkmu|goshakamasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakamasmu|gokishakamasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakamasher|shakamasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakamasnksher|goshakamasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakamasher|gokishakamasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakamasng|shakamasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakamasnkng|goshakamasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakamasng|gokishakamasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakamasya|shakamasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakamasnkya|goshakamasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakamasya|gokishakamasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakamasyam|shakamasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakamasnkyam|goshakamasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakamasyam|gokishakamasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakamasnĂŒshĂ«|shakamasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakamasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakamasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakamasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakamasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakamasnĂŒro|shakamasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakamasnknĂŒro|goshakamasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakamasnĂŒro|gokishakamasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakamasnĂŒmu|shakamasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakamasnknĂŒmu|goshakamasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakamasnĂŒmu|gokishakamasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakamashĂ«nĂŒ|shakamashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakamasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakamasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakamashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakamashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakamashĂ«ro|shakamashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakamasnkshĂ«ro|goshakamasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakamashĂ«ro|gokishakamashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakamashĂ«mu|shakamashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakamasnkshĂ«mu|goshakamasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakamashĂ«mu|gokishakamashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakamasronĂŒ|shakamasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakamasnkronĂŒ|goshakamasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakamasronĂŒ|gokishakamasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakamasroshĂ«|shakamasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakamasnkroshĂ«|goshakamasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakamasroshĂ«|gokishakamasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakamasromu|shakamasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakamasnkromu|goshakamasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakamasromu|gokishakamasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakamasmunĂŒ|shakamasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakamasnkmunĂŒ|goshakamasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakamasmunĂŒ|gokishakamasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakamasmushĂ«|shakamasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakamasnkmushĂ«|goshakamasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakamasmushĂ«|gokishakamasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakamasmuro|shakamasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakamasnkmuro|goshakamasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakamasmuro|gokishakamasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
